text: As I stand here in the dim corridor, the cold light from the emergency exit sign barely penetrates the darkness. I feel a subtle isolation, a sense of anticipation—every sound seems amplified in the stillness. There is an unsettling yet alluring mystery in the sterile, nighttime hush of these empty spaces. Moving into the next room, the illuminated words on the screen mirror my own thoughts: the obscurity around me both unsettles and invites introspection. I feel acutely aware—at once uneasy, and strangely comforted by the chance to pause and reflect.
